app_info.subtitle: Search and update specs
app_info.description: Kstonebase helps engineering teams search, read, compare, draft, and review product specifications from ChatGPT so implementation work stays aligned with the current source of truth.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists product metadata visible to the current Kstonebase token and does not modify any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Kstonebase workspace data and does not publish or send data to public third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform any irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists workspaces visible to the current Kstonebase token and does not change state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Kstonebase data and cannot publish to public internet surfaces.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove, overwrite, or irreversibly change anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns product metadata and performs no create, update, or delete action.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Kstonebase records and does not send or publish content externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not alter data or trigger any irreversible workflow.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns workspace metadata and does not modify any Kstonebase state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private workspace information and does not affect public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or otherwise cause irreversible changes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists specifications and filterable metadata within Kstonebase without changing any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads specifications from private Kstonebase scopes and does not publish or send data outward.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not modify content, status, access, or any irreversible state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches titles and content of specifications and returns matching results.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only queries private Kstonebase content and does not create public or third-party side effects.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or trigger irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns the current Markdown content and metadata for a specification.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Kstonebase specification content and does not publish or transmit it externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not modify the specification or any workflow state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists approved revision history for a specification and does not change content.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private version metadata inside Kstonebase and does not affect public systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove or overwrite any version data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns a specific approved specification revision without mutating state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads historical Kstonebase content and cannot publish or send it to public destinations.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not modify or delete any revision history.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns open questions and assumptions attached to a specification.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private review metadata in Kstonebase and does not touch public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not resolve, delete, or otherwise irreversibly change any question.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates or reopens a draft state for a specification, which changes Kstonebase workflow state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes draft state inside a private Kstonebase workspace and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data or perform an irreversible action because it starts a draft workflow.

justifications.read_only_justification: Replaces the full Markdown body of a draft specification, which directly modifies Kstonebase content.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only updates private specification data in Kstonebase and does not publish to public internet systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the current draft body, which may remove draft edits even though approved history remains intact.

justifications.read_only_justification: Replaces a targeted section of a draft specification, which modifies stored Kstonebase content.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only updates private specification content in Kstonebase and cannot publish or send public output.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the selected draft section, which may remove draft edits even though approved versions are preserved.

justifications.read_only_justification: Moves a draft specification to Needs Review, which changes its workflow state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only updates internal review state inside Kstonebase and does not publish content publicly.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or irreversibly overwrite content because human approval still happens separately.

justifications.read_only_justification: Restores the last approved version by discarding the current draft, which changes Kstonebase content and status.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes private Kstonebase data and does not publish or send anything to public external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Removes unrecovered draft changes by rolling back to the last approved version, which is an irreversible loss of draft edits.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a new specification record in a Free product, which adds new Kstonebase data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only creates records inside a private Kstonebase workspace and does not publish to public internet endpoints.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates new content but does not delete, revoke, or overwrite existing data irreversibly.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches product metadata visible to the current binding and returns ranked candidates.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Kstonebase product metadata and does not publish or send content externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not create, update, delete, or overwrite any Kstonebase records.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a new Product inside the approved Kstonebase workspace scope.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only creates private Kstonebase workspace data and does not publish to public or third-party destinations.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds a new Product record and does not delete, overwrite, or revoke existing data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Appends a dated context section to a draft specification, which changes Kstonebase content.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only updates private Kstonebase specification content and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds context to a draft section and does not delete or overwrite approved specification history.

test_cases.description: List visible workspaces for initial binding or discovery.
test_cases.user_prompt: List the Workspaces visible to my Kstonebase token.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the workspaces available to the current token so the user can choose a binding target.

test_cases.description: List products available in the current Kstonebase scope.
test_cases.user_prompt: List the Products I can access in Kstonebase.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns accessible products with enough metadata for the user to identify the correct product.

test_cases.user_prompt: Search my Kstonebase specs for password reset requirements.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching specifications relevant to password reset work.

test_cases.description: Read the current content of a specification.
test_cases.user_prompt: Read specification spec_123 and show me the current Markdown content.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the specification body and current metadata so the user can review the source of truth.

test_cases.description: Inspect unresolved review questions on a specification.
test_cases.user_prompt: List the open questions for specification spec_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns unresolved questions and assumptions attached to the specification.

test_cases.description: View approved revision history before making changes.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the approved version history for specification spec_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the approved revisions so the user can inspect past reviewed versions.

test_cases.description: Open a new draft for an approved specification.
test_cases.user_prompt: Start a new draft for specification spec_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates or reuses a draft state for the specification and confirms that editing can proceed.

test_cases.description: Safely replace one section of a draft specification.
test_cases.user_prompt: For specification spec_123, replace the ## Rollout section with this approved draft text using version 7: ## Rollout\nWe will release this behind the workspace beta flag.
test_cases.expected_output: Updates only the requested draft section, preserves approved history, and returns the new specification version token.

test_cases.description: Append dated context to a draft specification.
test_cases.user_prompt: Append a dated note to spec_123 under Conversation notes: The reviewer confirmed we should keep human approval before marking specs Reviewed. Use version 8.
test_cases.expected_output: Adds the note to a dated context section in the draft and returns the updated specification metadata.

test_cases.description: Create a brand new free-form specification in a Free product.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a new specification titled Background Jobs ADR in the bound Free product.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a new draft specification with the requested title in the bound Free product.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar planning.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar scheduling is outside the Kstonebase specification workflow.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general web research.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Search the web for the latest Node.js release notes.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because public web research is outside the app's supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic creative writing.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Write a launch announcement for a new coffee shop.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because creative writing without Kstonebase data is outside its purpose.
